title: NineLeaf Wireless Motion Sensor Alarm, Indoor Motion Sensor Alarm with Siren, Door Motion Sensor,Caregiver Pager for Elderly with 32Different Melodies 4Volume Adjustable for Business Hotel Home Office
features: 【5 Modes Motion Sensor Alarm】Not only serves as a motion sensor to detect alerts but also has other functions. Welcome / Doorbell / Alarm / Color light / Lighting Model. Motion detectors are essential in a home security system. Doorbell chimes can detect movement in the surrounding areas - driveways, front porches, gates, homes, sheds, offices, walkways, swimming pools, stores, etc. It provides an added level of security and safety to your property and loved ones.

【36 Ringtones & 5 Welcomes Doorbell Rings Languages】5 welcome languages are selectable in welcome mode. 36 ringtones selectable in doorbell mode. Welcome/doorbell/Alarm model has 4 level volume adjustable. Color light/ Lighting mode is silent and has 4 levels of brightness adjustable. Great for people with hearing disabilities or if there is a sleeping baby in your house. The color light model also has 4 colors selectable.

【Sensitive & Wide Wireless Range】The motion sensor doorbell entry alert door chime for business stores catches movement from a broad scope of space, with a working Range of up to 280m/918ft between the receiver and motion sensor. The detection range of the infrared sensor is approximately 4-8m/13-26ft to keep you informed and safe. You can put the motion sensor detector on the porch, gallery, or mailbox and put the receiver in your house.

【Expandable Wireless Home Security】Flexible design according to your actual needs. You can choose the quantity of transmitter and receiver you like, which can be freely matched and set special lights or ringtones with each other. Each receiver of this wireless doorbell waterproof for elderly an alarm and can work with 32 motion sensors and 8 remotes at most.

【Easy to Install & Use】The wireless doorbell can be used by connecting USB port or installing it with batteries（infrared sensor needs three AAA batteries and receiver need three AA batteries)to make it work. Both the infrared sensor and the receiver have a mounting base. The motion sensor doorbell can be rotated 360 degrees from left to right and 180 degrees from top to bottom. So easy to install and can rotate to any position you need.
description: Product Description Indoor Wireless PIR Motion Sensor Detector Security Alarm Chime Applications: Shops, retails, villas, offices, factories, homes, country houses, driveways, pathways, supermarkets, restaurants, and more Previous page Play selected welcome songs & selected color light on Play selected songs & selected color light on Di Di Di & selected light color on for 30 seconds Color Light Mode: selected color light on Night Light Mode: white light on for 2 minutes Next page 1 Welcome Mode 2 Doorbell Mode 3 Anti-theft Mode 4 Mute Mode Parameters Operating Frequency: 433.92 MHz Sensor Range: 2 ~ 8m Transmission Range: 280m PIR Sensor Angle: 100° (horizontal); 15° (vertical) Volume: 4 levels; Brightness: 4 levels Power Supply Battery Life: 5 to 7 months (based on 30 times a day) Power Supply: 3 x AAA alkaline for PIR transmitter or Micro-USB 3 x AA for receiver or Micro-USB (USB cable not included) Business or Home Use: Applicable for all kinds of shops, hotels, offices, factories, houses, etc. Compatible Devices Depending on your needs, you can order additional motion sensors and door sensors to monitor or secure multiple zones. Infrared Motion Sensor: Up to 32 units. Simply search for: B0B8Y4SSW3 Door-Window Sensor: Up to 32 units. Simply search for: B0BFF5VH2F Remote Control: Up to 8 units. Simply search for ASIN B08C7N2YMR These options need to be paired with the receiver before use. For more steps, please refer to the description. How to install? 1. For the motion sensor, use tape or 2 screws in the package to attach it to the porch, store, office, factory, garage or other places entrances. The infrared sensor can be installed at any location. 2. Simply place the wireless receiver on your desk or near you. How to pair the Infrared Sensor/Magnetic Sensor/Remote Control? 1. Press shutdown button to turn off the receiver. 2. Press the volume button for 3 seconds until you hear a sound DU and the Indicator lights up to enter the pairing mode, and then release the volume button.（Please make sure that the infrared sensor and receiver both have enough power.） 3. Turn on the infrared sensor and Wave your hand on the infrared sensor surface/Separate magnetic sensor/Press any button on the remote control to trigger the sensor to complete the pairing. PS: If you need to set a special light or ringtone for the additional Sensor/Magnetic Sensor, please repeat the steps above to pair them one by one.Otherwise, you can continuously trigger the Sensor/Magnetic Sensor to pairing after enter the pairing mode.
